@@ -120,58 +114,105 @@
     return summary

 

 

+def save_single_checkpoint(path, weight, bias, meta):

+    path = Path(path)

+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

+    ckpt = {

+        'config': {'in_dim': 124, 'out_dim': 128},

+        'model_state_dict': {

+            'linear.weight': torch.from_numpy(weight),

+            'linear.bias': torch.from_numpy(bias),

+        },

+        'meta': meta,

+    }

+    torch.save(ckpt, path)

+

+

+def save_ensemble_checkpoint(path, members, meta):

+    path = Path(path)

+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

+    ckpt = {

+        'ensemble': [

+            {

+                'weight': np.asarray(m['weight'], dtype=np.float32),

+                'bias': np.asarray(m['bias'], dtype=np.float32),

+                'meta': m.get('meta', {}),

+            }

+            for m in members

+        ],

+        'meta': meta,

+    }

+    torch.save(ckpt, path)

+

+
